violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

(Milk) was observed held at (53) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

Working containers of (dry food product) are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024

Milk dispenser located in the (front counter) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 54Df.Establishment not allowed to store any TCS product in unit until repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
Establishment is lacking sink stoppers for 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
Leak observed at the plumbing under the 3 bay sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/01/2024
